detail.name: 时光小剧场
detail.summary:
咔嚓——快门声响起！时光代理人 小剧场即将回归！
时光照相馆再次迎来了平静温馨的日常……而在遥远的英都，经历了"那场意外"后的他们又在干什么呢？
2026年4月4日起，每周六11:00更新，大家不见不散哟！

detail.summary: 该动画为苏联1970年上映的默剧《Это в наших силах》，世界著名反法西斯作品。

episodes.name: Это в наших силах
episodes.desc: Из яйца со свастикой, на глазах американских империалистов, вылупляется чёрный орлёнок, которого эти империалисты — банкир и военный, — попеременно начинают кормить деньгами, оружием и техникой. В это время в разных городах мира (Лондоне, Париже, Москве, Токио) идёт повседневная жизнь — встречаются влюблённые пары, подрастает молодое поколение. Птенец меж тем становится всё больше и превращается в гигантскую хищную птицу, с громким гулом пролетающую над миром, вызывая страх и панику среди людей Земли. Чёрный орёл сбрасывает свои перья-бомбы на Вьетнам, взрывая и сжигая деревни и леса. Неожиданно на пути орла появляются маленькие белые голуби, мешающие ему выполнять страшную работу. Эти голуби появляются в результате протестов мирных людей и общественности всех стран. Голубей становится всё больше и больше, они собираются в огромную стаю в виде голубя, превосходящего своими размерами орла. «Голубь» преследует орла, окутывает его своей массой и разрушает. Ощипанный орёл в виде разваливающейся свастики падает и тонет в океане. На Земле вновь становится спокойно и мирно.

detail.name: Simba Jr. re del football
detail.summary: 辛巴和朋友去纽约寻找被绑架的温纳狗。然而，就在“大苹果”中，我们发现温纳已成为足球队的教练和训练师，将参加首届“动物足球世界杯”。每个团队都是他们所代表的国家的典型动物。这肯定是在整个世界上有史以来最特 别，最难忘的锦标赛！

detail.name: 箱の時代
detail.summary: 一个对女性有情结的男人，历经种种曲折才遇到他的理想伴侣，但她的真实身份是什么呢？

detail.name: Next Show in 90 Minutes
detail.summary: A routine both natural and unnatural unfolds in the heart of one of America’s most cherished landscapes.

detail.name: Arzak Rhapsody
detail.summary: Perched on his trusty anti-gravity Pteroid (where nothing serious can reach him), Arzak explores Desert “B” - a parallel world, populated by strange creatures, situated on the borders of dreams and a reality beyond reality. But isn’t Arzak dreaming of a universe within himself… or within each and every one of us?

episodes.name: Rhapsodie du désert
episodes.desc: Arzak is meditating in the heart of Desert "B" when his faithful Pteroid comes to seek him for his first mission: to restore the magical order of the universe. In order to do so, a quick visit to the Soul of the Winds Tower is of the utmost necessity. But our hero is far from suspecting that he will open a door to strange invisible dimensions.

episodes.name: L'ombre du matin
episodes.desc: While flying over a particularly dangerous mountainous region, Arzak is the victim of a hallucination: the shadow of a rock turns into a monstrous jaw. At the bend of a large canyon, he discovers a seemingly deserted stone tower. He then decides to stop there when the first shadows of the night catch up with him.

episodes.name: Station Stardust
episodes.desc: Arzak follows Route 88, which crosses Desert "B", when he notices a red car too fast for his brave Pteroid. He barely has time to see the blue eyes of the driver who taunts him. The lone warrior then decides to pursue the mysterious woman to the Stardust Café. But he's not the only one in the race.

episodes.name: La Belle réparatrice
episodes.desc: Dawn is rising over Desert "B". Arzak discovers that his faithful Pteroid is held captive in the web of an electric Arachnoidea. At the same time, in the alleys of a carnivorous garden, a woman driving a strange vehicle answers a call. Her mission: to repair mechanisms she doesn't understand and save beings she never sees.

episodes.name: La Perle du venin
episodes.desc: While trying to escape from two hungry demons, The Louff and The Rydane, Arzak is hit in mid-flight by a serpent-arrow whose venom effect is unpredictable. While The Louff is about to cook our hero who has become unconscious, the latter comes into contact with the spirit of the serpent's venom.

episodes.name: Coeur de singe
episodes.desc: On certain winter nights, Desert "B" sees immense fields of carnivorous grasses reappear. Sheltered at the top of the ruins of a stone arch, Arzak accompanies with a flute tune the heartbeat of a great ape suspended in the void under the monument, trying to escape from the carnivorous fields. An image is taking form in the mind of the warrior: that of a woman at the seaside. The fate of the animal depends only on a dream.

episodes.name: La Cité perdue
episodes.desc: Arzak walks the streets of a city in ruins, where there isn't a living soul to meet on the streets, not even a creature or a simple movement. Around him, everything is abandoned: skyscrapers, rusty car wrecks, empty apartments immersed in silence. The city seems deserted until the warrior hears a mysterious voice singing to an old tune of music.

episodes.name: La Neuvième déesse
episodes.desc: Arzak goes aboard a spaceship on the orders of two aliens: Delano and Xnobol. Inside, the warrior discovers a sarcophagus containing a goddess suffering from a serious illness, and he will try to save the alien entity, the Ninth Goddess.

episodes.name: La Tête du guerrier
episodes.desc: Arzak is resting at the Auberge des Monts Verts in the company of Perle, a very attractive young woman. But the warrior does not suspect that his companion is acting on behalf of a power-hungry alien. This entity is known as the King, and he is assisted by the Souricier - his own devoted mad scientist. Is there a bounty on Arzak's head? Arzak will soon have to figure it out.

episodes.name: La Tour Nuageuse
episodes.desc: Without news of the Guardian of the Cloud Tower whom he has for mission to protect, Arzak decides to go there. Once inside, he discovers that time has stood still. Even Baluga, the janitor robot, broke down. But where has the Keeper of the Tower gone? Is she still alive? Is the tower occupied by an invisible and nefarious force?

episodes.name: Noshka
episodes.desc: Noshka, the Secret Soul of Desert "B", has been kidnapped by a monstrous Djinn. Arzak is instructed by Governor Block to find her using a magic key allowing him to open several parallel dimensions. The only thing is: the key is hanging on the sleeping monster's neck. Will Arzak manage to deliver Noshka from the clutches of the monster?

episodes.name: L'Homme des jeux
episodes.desc: Searching for an exit from an inextricable maze in which he is a prisoner, Arzak comes face to face with several dangerous creatures. Fortunately, the last of the Ptero-warriors still wields the sword well. The fighting continues until Arzak is seriously injured. Are invisible forces controlling our hero?

episodes.name: L'Anneau des coeurs brisés
episodes.desc: Flying over the fields of carnivorous grasses on a rainy night, Arzak seeks shelter. A construction, in the shape of a broken stone ring, suddenly appears in the midst of the killing plants. Tired, Arzak decides to set up camp there. But the night is long and maybe our hero shouldn't fall asleep so easily.

episodes.name: Le Secret des licornes
episodes.desc: Arzak wakes up with a start. He has just seen his own death in a terrible nightmare. He must seek advice from the unicorns before it is too late. Our hero soon finds himself aboard a strange vessel en route to a parallel world. Will he have a chance to change the course of his destiny?

detail.name: Die Spur führt zum Silbersee
detail.summary: Based on the classical novel "Treasure of Silver Lake" by Karl May. Cowboys Hobble Frank and Tante Droll are instructed to deliver the legacy of chief Weiser Bär, a map to the legendary Treasure of the Silver Lake, to his hiers Großer Bär and Kleiner Bär. But the bandit Cornel Brinkley and his buddies manage to steal the map and so Frank and Droll call up Old Shatterhand and Winnetou, to help them in their quest to recapture the map and save the treasure.

detail.name: 天眼之父南仁东
detail.summary: 《天眼之父南仁东》改编自陈言原著的漫画书《人民科学家:南仁东与中国天眼》。

detail.name: 小草帽
detail.summary: 小草帽和猪兄弟居住在同一个地球上，因为黑客的捣蛋，猪兄弟们不断干出破坏生态的傻事。在小草帽的帮助、教育下，大家终于懂得了：地球只有一个，我们应该一起保护自己赖以生存的美丽星球。

detail.name: 折叠的唐诗
detail.summary: 作为全国首部聚焦少儿古诗词的定格动画系列短片，该作品以折纸为载体，结合逐格动画技术呈现唐诗典故与意境。剧情通过现代女孩“荔小漫”的视角，串联李白、王之涣等唐代诗人的灵感瞬间，采用奇幻谐趣叙事与可爱灵动的画风，旨在帮助儿童理解古诗背景及诗人心境。

detail.name: 钟点父子
detail.summary: 讲述了一个离婚的老爸借着钟点工机会回家见儿子的故事，体现出亲情的温馨。

detail.name: 哈哈咪
detail.summary: 不管是闪电、雷雨，绝不会放弃，让我们一起创造更好的奇迹！

detail.name: 福星八戒之猴年特辑吉吉火猴年
detail.name_cn: 福星八戒之猴年特辑吉吉火猴年
detail.summary: 八戒四人组无意中来到了传说中的树城——“福愿之城”！这个奇妙的城市分层建立在一棵巨大的树上，垂直的枝干是升降电梯，可爱的菌类成为一杆杆路灯，为来往的甲虫“的士”照明。

detail.name: 翻开这一页 第1季
detail.summary:
《翻开这一页》动画片的内容题材，取材于中小学语文课本中的近现代26个经典党史和伟人故事，包含伟人故事和重大事件两大系列，以小学生语文课本中的党史故事为蓝本，生动讲述老一辈无产阶级革命家的理想信念和价值追求。
《翻开这一页》动画片的内容题材，取材于中小学语文课本中的近现代26个经典党史和伟人故事，包含伟人故事和重大事件两大系列，对26堂语文课经典进行解读，制作成26集动画片，每集12分钟。其中，《毛主席在花山》、《朱德的扁担》、《军神》、《倔强的小红军》、《邓稼先》等伟人课本故事，将深入挖掘老一辈无产阶级革命家的人文价值精髓，从另一个视角为中国共产党人当时的中国梦做生动解读。而12分钟微电影动画大片的表达形式，将《金色的鱼钩》、《狼牙山五壮士》、《丰碑》、《飞夺泸定桥》、《老山界》、《卢沟桥烽火》等经典课文以动画电...

detail.name: 神剑传奇
detail.summary: 从前有一把举世无双的太阳神剑，谁能得到它就会功力大增，成为世界主宰。神剑几百年出现一次，这一次又引起了一场以白云道长为首的正派和以黑风教主为首的魔教之间的正邪大战。但谁也没有想到，这次胜负的关键却决定于一个平凡却又命中注定的小男孩金豆豆，他将书写一段英雄传奇……

detail.name: Phantom Canyon
detail.summary: A curious woman meets an alluring man with bat wings in this personal recollection of a pivotal journey. This 10 minute animated film was created from over 4000 hand-made collages incorporating the figures from Eadweard Muybridge’s Human and Animal Locomotion, first published in 1887.

detail.name: Edge of Alchemy
detail.summary: Edge of Alchemy is the third film in a trilogy examining the psychological terrain of women’s inner worlds. In this handmade film, assembled from over 6,000 collages, the actors Mary Pickford and Janet Gaynor are lifted from their early silent features and cast into a surreal epic with an unending of the Frankenstein story and contemporary undercurrents of hive collapse.
